'''K5 Enforcer Droids''' were a series of [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]] developed by [[Rim Securities/Legends|Rim Securities]]. It had a domed head with one sweeping visual sensor and was equipped with a [[Vocabulator/Legends|vocabulator]] speech and sound system. It had two arms and two auto-balance legs, and was equipped with armored body plates. K5 droids were typically armed with a variety of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] weapons. They were mostly used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for security in their many prison and government facilities, but some crime lords and powerful corporations also were in possession of K5 units.

{{Droid-stub}}
